entities.description: Region from which fig germplasm accessions were collected

entities.description: The variation of genetic characteristics within the fig population

entities.description: A collection of 60 fig accessions established for diversity analysis

entities.description: The state of having different alleles at a locus in fig genotypes

entities.name: OUTBREEDING
entities.description: The process of mating between unrelated individuals in the fig population

entities.description: Statistical method used to reveal genetic structure and variation

entities.description: Statistical method used to correlate genetic makeup and geographical origin

entities.description: A measure used to determine the informativeness of SSR markers

entities.description: A tool developed for cultivar discrimination and intellectual property protection

entities.name: CULTIVAR DISCRIMINATION

entities.name: INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY PROTECTION

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FIG PRODUCTION
entities.description: The goal of maintaining long-term viable fig production regionally and worldwide

entities.name: GERMPLASM
